sourcesContent:
// ============================================================
// ✏️  YOUR WORK EXPERIENCE — Edit jobs here
// ============================================================
const EXP = [
  {
    role:    "Backend Developer",
    company: "Your Company",        // 🔧 change
    period:  "2023 — Present",
    type:    "Full-time",
    arcana:  "I",
    color:   "#00c8ff",
    desc:    "Designed and maintained scalable REST APIs serving thousands of daily requests. Optimized database queries reducing response time by 45%.",
    tags:    ["Node.js", "PostgreSQL", "Docker", "Redis"],
    special: false,
  },
  {
    role:    "API Engineer",
    company: "Tech Startup",        // 🔧 change
    period:  "2022 — 2023",
    type:    "Full-time",
    arcana:  "II",
    color:   "#7b61ff",
    desc:    "Built microservice architecture from scratch. Implemented auth systems, rate limiting, and real-time notification services.",
    tags:    ["Python", "FastAPI", "MongoDB", "WebSockets"],
    special: false,
  },
  {
    role:    "Work & Travel — USA 🇺🇸",
    company: "Tennessee · Las Vegas · LA · San Francisco",
    period:  "2022",
    type:    "Work & Travel",
    arcana:  "✈",
    color:   "#ffd700",
    desc:    "Worked at Dollywood Theme Park in Tennessee and part-time at a Thai restaurant. Explored Tennessee, Las Vegas, Los Angeles, and San Francisco. An unforgettable life adventure.",
    tags:    ["Dollywood", "Thai Restaurant", "Tennessee", "Las Vegas", "LA", "San Francisco"],
    special: true,
  },
  {
    role:    "Junior Backend Dev",
    company: "Digital Agency",      // 🔧 change
    period:  "2021 — 2022",
    type:    "Contract",
    arcana:  "III",
    color:   "#ff6b9d",
    desc:    "Developed backend features for client web apps. Built automated data pipelines and third-party API integrations.",
    tags:    ["Node.js", "MySQL", "REST APIs", "AWS"],
    special: false,
  },
];

export default EXP;
